corrective_action: Add market hours gate (6:30 AM - 1:00 PM PT only)
Add 'already moved' filter (>15% daily move = skip)
Change time-in-force to IOC (no overnight holds)
manual_lessons.key_insight: Pre-breakout entries outperform post-breakout chases. Time-of-day discipline prevents bad fills.
manual_lessons.outcome: Order cancelled before execution - lesson learned without loss
